faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I download Meta AI videos without watermark?
faq.a1: Simply copy your Meta AI video URL, paste it into our downloader tool above, and click Download. Our system automatically processes the video and provides you with a pristine, watermark-free HD MP4 file.
faq.q2: Is this tool completely free to use?
faq.a2: Yes! ClipVidSaver is 100% free. We don't require any registration, subscriptions, or hidden fees. You can download as many videos as you want.
faq.q3: Does downloading affect the video quality?
faq.a3: No. We extract the native source file directly from the Meta AI servers. This ensures you get the exact same HD resolution, framerate, and audio quality as the original generation without any compression loss.
faq.q4: Which devices and browsers are supported?
faq.a4: Our web-based downloader works on all modern devices including iPhone, Android, Mac, and Windows PCs. It is compatible with Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Edge.
